action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 4 crashed during training with ValueError from BatchNorm on a [1,512,1,1] tensor inside the PPM adaptive-pool branch. This happens when a DDP rank receives a single sample in the last batch. The train.py file was also truncated mid-file in the workspace display. Analysis: We need a complete, syntactically correct train.py that (1) sets drop_last=True in the training DataLoader to eliminate size-1 batches, (2) downsamples ground-truth masks to match the 1/4-resolution logits before loss, and (3) upsamples predictions during validation mIoU computation. Decision: Rewrite train.py from scratch with these fixes, plus SyncBatchNorm conversion for stability, mixed-precision training, and end-of-epoch validation. Run a 2-epoch DDP training on 4 GPUs to establish a stable baseline checkpoint.
